steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The phrase “symbolically ______ to portray...” is enclosed by commas and modifies the noun “painting.” Left of blank: “symbolically” (adverb). Right of blank: “to portray...” (infinitive phrase).

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content: A phrase set off by commas that describes a noun must use a participle, not a finite verb. “Functioning” is the present participle that creates the phrase “symbolically functioning to portray.” The other three choices are finite verbs, which cannot function as participles in a descriptive phrase. That matches choice D — D is correct.
